ValidationRule.description: Order Fulfilment related records are not to edit
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Scale_Utility_Overage_ProdOps_Edit_Access), NOT(ISNEW()), $User.Alias <> 'autoproc', NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'API')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'IT System Admin')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'IT Prod Ops Support')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'System - IT')), ISPICKVAL(Original_Order__r.Order_Status__c , 'Shipped') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You aren’t authorized to Edit Snowflake Feeds, hence please create a support ticket with ProdOps Support or email ProdOpsapps@rubrik.com” with details
